candidate_formula: S_gauge contains Tr(F wedge *F); * depends on g_Berger and its volume form
claim_boundary: The schematic Hodge star is metric-dependent, but BHSM does not evaluate its Berger base/fiber factors in the gauge action.
evidence_against: no explicit Hodge map or component coefficients in r_base,r_fiber are supplied
evidence_for: the normalized gauge skeleton explicitly uses F wedge *F
g_Berger and sqrt(det g_Berger) are localized
